card.intuition: An orchestration platform for automating the deployment, scaling, and management of containerized applications across a cluster of servers.
card.analogy: A captain of a fleet: you tell the captain 'I want 3 ships carrying corn' (Desired State). If one ship sinks, the captain automatically orders a new ship to be built and filled with corn to maintain the 3-ship minimum (Self-healing).
when_to_use: Automating horizontal scaling based on traffic spikes
Maintaining high availability with automated restarts and replacements
gotchas: The 'Control Plane' (Master) nodes manage the cluster, while 'Worker' nodes run your actual applications. If the control plane fails, the cluster is 'headless' and can't change state.
Pods are ephemeral: never store data inside a Pod's local disk, as it will be purged when the pod restarts. Use Persistent Volumes (PVs) instead.

exercise.prompt: Identify the smallest deployable unit in Kubernetes that can contain one or more containers.
exercise.test_code:
def check(ans): return ans.lower() == "pod"
assert check("Pod")
print("PASS")
